CreateRobotAccount.name: Robot account name. Note: the created robot account will automatically be prefixed with `ccr$`; for example, if you enter `test`, the actual username will be `ccr$test`. Length must be between 1 and 65 characters, must start and end with a lowercase letter or digit, and may contain lowercase letters, digits, and special characters `._-`; consecutive special characters are not allowed.
CreateRobotAccount.secret: Account password; if left empty, one will be auto-generated by the system. Length must be between 8 and 65 characters and must contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, or special characters. Allowed special characters: `!@#$%^*()`
CreateRobotAccount.disable: Whether to disable the account; defaults to `false`
CreateRobotAccount.duration: Account validity period in days; `-1` indicates the account never expires
CreateRobotAccount.description: Account description; length between 0 and 1024 characters
CreateRobotAccount.permissions.namespace: Namespace name; use `*` to indicate all namespaces are selected
